## 15-minute checklist

- [ ] Installed or updated Caroline
- [ ] Opened `http://YOUR-CAROLINE-IP:8080/`
- [ ] Sent one chat message
- [ ] Checked Settings device type and AI provider/model
- [ ] Tested one widget or integration
- [ ] Refreshed the dashboard
- [ ] Checked update/status behavior if available
